npx_runtime_fetch_risk: commands intentionally used npx -y acpx@0.12.0 for Phase -1 capture; V0.1a run path should prefer a pinned local binary/digest.

path_enforcement_conclusion.source_inspection: FileSystemHandlers.resolvePathWithinRoot checks absolute path and isWithinRoot(rootDir, resolved) in acpx@0.12.0 dist/live-checkpoint-CuFft_Nd.js.
path_enforcement_conclusion.summary: acpx@0.12.0 client fs handlers source-resolve absolute paths inside cwd, but Phase -1 did not prove AgentRoleSpec allowed_roots as an OS/filesystem sandbox.
path_enforcement_conclusion.v0_1a_rule: Treat allowed_roots as cwd/config validation only unless a later OS sandbox/path-policy layer is added.

permission_policy_fixture.conclusion: acpx@0.12.0 accepts --permission-policy JSON with autoDeny/defaultAction in the observed runner flag family.

schema_summary.stdout_shape: newline-delimited JSON objects observed from acpx --format json

fixtures.name: session-new-named
fixtures.semantics: Create a fresh named persistent session.

fixtures.name: session-ensure-existing
fixtures.semantics: Ensure the existing named session without creating another.

fixtures.name: session-show-open
fixtures.semantics: Show open session record before prompt turns.

fixtures.name: session-prompt-turn2
fixtures.semantics: Follow-up persistent prompt turn reusing the same ACP session.

fixtures.name: session-show-after-turns
fixtures.semantics: Show session after two prompt turns.

fixtures.name: session-cancel-no-active
fixtures.semantics: Idle cancel should not close the session.

session_contract.management_command_schema: Each management command emits a single summarized JSON object (acpx.session.v1 record or an action snapshot), NOT a raw ACP NDJSON stream.
session_contract.phase: S1a persistent-session contract spike refreshed for acpx 0.12.0
session_contract.prompt_command_schema: Prompt turns emit raw newline-delimited ACP/JSON-RPC stdout; turn2 reuses the same ACP session id and omits initialize/session-new setup.

schema_summary.session_continuity: turn1 and turn2 share exactly one ACP session id

session_contract.status: acpx 0.12.0 persistent-session contract evidence captured. Local persistent-session runtime support lives in source code; this fixture set remains schema/grammar evidence only and does not approve live/platform behavior.

skipped_fixtures.name: interrupted-exit130
skipped_fixtures.reason: Reliable SIGINT orchestration is deferred; V0.1a classifier will still table-test 130 without a live acpx fixture.
